title: Imaging
description: The Imaging module integrates medical imaging data with clinical records, enabling researchers to link radiological findings and imaging-derived biomarkers with patient phenotypes. It supports the incorporation of imaging data into multimodal research studies within the OMOP CDM framework.
tips: Ensure imaging study identifiers are correctly linked to patient records in the CDM before running any cohort-level imaging analyses.
Use imaging-derived phenotypes in combination with clinical cohort definitions to refine case identification for research studies.
Review data quality and completeness of imaging metadata fields prior to including imaging endpoints in a study protocol.
Coordinate with your radiology informatics team to standardise image annotation and measurement extraction workflows.
Apply appropriate governance controls to imaging data access given the sensitivity of radiological records and associated re-identification risks.
